QFTCS is the most testable pillar: analogue Hawking/Unruh radiation (BEC, optics, Josephson junctions, trapped ions), GIE protocols, and Diosi-Penrose decoherence with microgram cat states and levitated nanoparticles. No direct detection of Unruh/Hawking radiation yet, and discriminating semiclassical from quantized gravity remains the goal.

Observer-dependence of the particle concept, the vacuum-ambiguity problem, the role of measurement in gravity, and whether gravity is fundamentally classical (Moller-Rosenfeld, Oppenheim) or quantized are core conceptual issues; Eppley-Hannah and Grossardt analyses probe the consistency of semiclassical coupling with quantum linearity.

Trace-anomaly coefficients (a,c) and higher-derivative counterterms organize the one-loop divergences of matter in curved space; in supergravity these enter the on-shell counterterm structure and UV (non-)renormalizability analyses, sharing the heat-kernel/Seeley-DeWitt machinery with QFTCS renormalization.

The Page curve is computed within semiclassical gravity once quantum extremal surfaces / islands and replica wormholes are included, showing that the semiclassical gravitational path integral itself encodes unitary information return; the relation to the alternative semiclassical 'final singularity' resolution is open.

The trace-anomaly charges (a,c) govern the universal terms of entanglement entropy in d=4: the universal logarithmic coefficient is controlled by c (and a, via the geometry of the entangling surface), and the spherical/Renyi entanglement entropy of a CFT is set by a. This is the bridge from the anomaly cluster to the entanglement-entropy line. Established literature (convention note, no repo computation yet): Casini-Huerta-Myers (spherical EE = a), Solodukhin (log coefficient ~ c). Repo anchor: F-029 extracts a dimensionless c_EE coefficient (c^2D_EE ~ 7.70, CV 3%), whose relation to the anomalous (a,c) is the H-B test target.

The 4D a-theorem (monotonic decrease of the a-charge under RG flow) was PROVEN via entanglement entropy: the spherical entanglement entropy of a CFT equals the a-charge (Casini-Huerta-Myers), and strong subadditivity / entanglement monotonicity of EE yields the a-theorem (Casini-Huerta). This closes the a-theorem island, which previously carried a single edge. Established literature (convention note, no invented arXiv IDs): Casini-Huerta-Myers, Casini-Huerta; original a-theorem proof Komargodski-Schwimmer.

AdS/CFT is a direct product of string theory (the two descriptions of D3-branes give IIB on AdS5xS5 = N=4 SYM). The boundary between 'string theory' and 'holography' is organizational rather than physical; AdS/CFT is the string result par excellence and the sharpest realization of holography.

String theory gave the first microscopic black-hole entropy count (Strominger-Vafa, S=2 pi sqrt(Q1 Q5 n)=A/4G), the fuzzball/microstate-geometry program, and (via AdS/CFT) the route to the Page curve and replica wormholes. Strongest quantitative bridge to black-hole physics.

10D supergravity is the low-energy limit of superstrings and 11D supergravity that of M-theory; string theory provides the UV completion. Whether N=8 supergravity is UV-finite by itself is a closely related but distinct question.

The swampland program is an internal branch of string theory delimiting which EFTs admit a stringy/quantum-gravity UV completion (Distance, Weak Gravity, Emergent String conjectures, species scale). The most active bridge to cosmology and phenomenology.

Via AdS/CFT, the Ryu-Takayanagi formula (S = Area/4G for entanglement entropy) and the ER=EPR / 'spacetime from entanglement' program connect geometry to quantum information. Active but incompletely understood, especially away from AdS.

In a strong B-field, the D-brane worldvolume becomes a non-commutative space with a Moyal product; the Seiberg-Witten map relates commutative and non-commutative descriptions. Matrix models (IKKT/BFSS) also realize non-commuting coordinates. The B-field limit is well understood, but the broader link to Connes-style noncommutative geometry and the Standard Model is barely explored.

Witten's twistor string (2003) supports perturbative N=4 SYM amplitudes on holomorphic curves in twistor space; ambitwistor strings reproduce field-theory amplitudes and connect to celestial holography and soft theorems. Shared mathematical structure, growing but partial.

In AdS/CFT gravity emerges from a non-gravitational boundary gauge theory; in matrix models spacetime and gravity emerge from matrix dynamics. Conceptually allied to Verlinde entropic gravity and Jacobson's thermodynamic derivation, but those remain formally separate.

Einstein's equations arise in string theory as the worldsheet conformal-invariance (beta-function vanishing) condition; semiclassical gravity is the leading low-energy approximation with computable alpha' and g_s corrections.

String-gas cosmology (Brandenberger-Vafa) uses Hagedorn thermodynamics and T-duality to select three large dimensions; pre-Big-Bang and ekpyrotic scenarios, the landscape and quintessence feed cosmology. No controlled holographic cosmology yet; partial.

Both seek quantum gravity and both reproduce S=A/4G for black holes, but by entirely different mechanisms (D-brane state counting vs spin-network area quanta) with radically different kinematics (continuous strings on a background vs background-independent discrete geometry). Essentially no direct mathematical bridge - one of the project's prime unexplored opportunities.

Asymptotic safety posits a non-trivial UV fixed point of gravity with no new degrees of freedom, whereas string theory adds an infinite tower of states and alpha' corrections. A possible bridge is the species scale relating the tower of states to UV running of couplings, but this is almost unexplored.

Both involve emergence of smooth geometry, and matrix models (IKKT/BFSS) are 'pre-geometric' formulations conceptually akin to discrete/combinatorial gravity. An explicit map from matrix dynamics to CDT-style discretized geometry has essentially not been pursued.

GFT generates spacetime from a field over a group manifold via Feynman diagrams summing discrete geometries; matrix/tensor models (an ancestor of GFT) overlap technically with the IKKT/BFSS matrix-model approach to emergent space. The shared 'matrix/tensor -> spacetime' structure is recognized but the explicit correspondence is barely explored.

Causal sets build spacetime from a discrete partial order; string theory has no fundamental discreteness of causal structure, but both confront Lorentz invariance and emergent continuum geometry. Any technical bridge (e.g. via matrix models or holographic causal structure) is speculative and essentially untouched.

Candidate signatures: cosmic superstrings in the stochastic gravitational-wave background (LISA, pulsar timing arrays); the dark dimension scenario predicting micron-scale deviations from Newtonian gravity and Kaluza-Klein dark matter; SUSY (not yet observed). No confirmed prediction; the weakest link of the program.

String theory frames foundational debates on background independence (the duality web vs a manifestly background-independent formulation), the meaning of the landscape and anthropic reasoning, and the criteria of scientific testability (the 'string wars').

N=8 supergravity is the low-energy limit of type II superstrings on T^6 and 11D supergravity is the low-energy limit of M-theory. Green-Ooguri-Schwarz (2007) proved N=8 SUGRA cannot be decoupled from strings for d>3, so string theory is its UV completion. The double copy/KLT explicitly relates closed strings (gravity) to open strings (gauge).

All multiloop progress on N=8 UV behavior relies on amplitude technology: generalized unitarity, BCJ color-kinematics duality, the double copy and the no-triangle hypothesis. The KLT kernel and kinematic numerators are the shared mathematical substrate.

Both target the non-renormalizability of gravity but differently: asymptotic safety seeks a nonperturbative UV fixed point while supergravity relies on perturbative cancellations. Gies-Knorr-Lippoldt-Saueressig (2016) showed the Goroff-Sagnotti two-loop counterterm sits at a fixed point, and Stelle's higher-derivative gravity feeds asymptotic-safety truncations.

Donoghue's EFT of gravity is the universal low-energy/semiclassical baseline: the quantum correction to the Newtonian potential (coefficient 41/(10 pi)) and other nonanalytic terms must be reproduced by any quantum-gravity theory, providing a mandatory IR consistency check.

The distinction between UV finiteness and UV completeness, the meaning of non-renormalizability, and the ghost/unitarity tension in higher-derivative gravity are central conceptual issues that the EFT viewpoint reframes (predictivity without renormalizability).

Conformal (Weyl) gravity and critical gravity arise in renormalized AdS actions and boundary holographic descriptions; Maldacena's removal of the conformal-gravity ghost uses boundary conditions, and color-kinematics/double copy is being studied in curved (AdS) backgrounds.

Horava-Lifshitz gravity shares with CDT a preferred foliation (causal/preferred time) and UV spectral-dimension reduction d_s -> 2, suggesting a common UV structure. The formal link between the CDT continuum limit and a Horava fixed point is essentially unexplored.

Green-Ooguri-Schwarz conjecture that perturbatively finite N=8 supergravity is in the swampland because it cannot decouple from strings (infinite towers of KK/winding/brane states). A formal proof via modern swampland criteria (distance, weak-gravity) is missing.

Unimodular gravity recasts the cosmological constant as an integration constant rather than a Lagrangian coupling, potentially shielding it from radiative corrections; whether this genuinely addresses the cosmological-constant problem at the quantum level is contested.

Nonlocal/infinite-derivative ghost-free gravity regularizes the UV via a fundamental nonlocality scale M_s with form factor e^{-Box/M_s^2}, analogous to noncommutative 'smearing' of spacetime points. The relationship is analogical and almost unexplored.

Horava-Lifshitz z=3 scaling yields scale-invariant primordial perturbations without inflation; agravity predicts inflation (n_s ~ 0.967, r ~ 0.13) from beta-functions; unimodular gravity changes the status of Lambda in cosmology. Explicit per-theory, not unified.

Almost no direct bridge: LQG is nonperturbative and background-independent, supergravity/EFT perturbative and background-dependent. Shape dynamics (conformal reformulation of GR) has a distant kinship with relational/problem-of-time aspects of LQG, but no concrete link to UV behavior exists.

Horava-Lifshitz gravity exhibits a UV spectral dimension d_s -> 2 (from d_s=4 in the IR), the same dimensional-reduction signature found in CDT, asymptotic safety and other approaches; this shared UV indicator is a candidate deep cross-approach structure but is not quantitatively connected to the supergravity cancellation mechanism.

Some Lifshitz/Horava models were proposed as a 'Fermi-point scenario of emergent gravity' (emergent Lorentz symmetry from a Fermi point); agravity and Stelle gravity present Einstein gravity as IR-emergent from a dimensionless UV theory, with Newton's constant generated by dimensional transmutation from beta-functions. Conceptual bridge only, not formalized.

A UV-finite or UV-complete quantum gravity must consistently describe black holes and the information paradox; the Green-Ooguri-Schwarz nondecoupling of N=8 from strings relies on black-hole/brane states. Whether perturbative finiteness says anything about black-hole microstates is open. The classical double copy (Kerr-Schild, gravitational waves) may link perturbative amplitudes to black-hole physics.

EFT amplitudes in the classical limit yield post-Newtonian/post-Minkowskian coefficients for binary inspirals (gravitational-wave 'amplitudes for LIGO/LISA' program). Universal quantum corrections (light bending, Shapiro delay, 41/(10 pi) potential) are computed but far below experimental sensitivity; the bridge to measuring quantum gravity via EFT is conceptually clear but practically out of reach.

The landscape IS the set of string compactifications, and every conjecture (WGC, SDC, emergent string, finiteness) is distilled and tested in explicit string vacua (CY, F-theory, heterotic). Open question whether conjectures hold beyond string theory.

The only proofs of swampland statements (no global symmetries, compact gauge groups, completeness) are holographic, via quantum error correction (Harlow-Ooguri). AdS Distance Conjecture directly constrains AdS/CFT vacua; Bousso bound enters the refined de Sitter derivation.

WGC derives from extremal black hole decay and absence of remnants; Festina Lente from charged Nariai evaporation in de Sitter; species scale equals the inverse minimal-black-hole size with S_BH ~ N; no-global-symmetries from black-hole charge non-conservation. Deeply quantitative.

Conjectures are tested in 4D N=1 supergravities from compactification; de Sitter and AdS conjectures constrain F-term potentials; KKLT/LVS are SUGRA constructions; Maldacena-Nunez no-go theorems feed the de Sitter debate.

de Sitter conjecture, TCC and Festina Lente bound inflation, dark energy and quintessence (V^{1/4}<10^9 GeV); DESI dynamical dark energy data is interpreted through these. But eternal inflation, creation-from-nothing and the de Sitter 'missing corner' are only heuristically connected (Banks: eternal inflation itself is swampy).

Emergence proposal: gauge/gravitational kinetic terms and finite moduli-space diameter emerge from integrating out towers of states; the species scale is an emergent gravitational cutoff. Concrete but limited to one-loop computations in specific limits.

No-global-symmetries is proven via quantum error correction, the same machinery underlying 'entanglement builds geometry' (RT, ER=EPR). Species scale ties species count to holographic entanglement entropy. Quantitative linking of swampland bounds to entanglement entropy remains open.

The WGC follows from positivity/causality bounds on EFT amplitudes (gravitational positivity, EFT-hedron, Regge boundedness). Swampland constraints act as boundaries of the allowed S-matrix space. Connection to twistor methods and amplitude positive geometry is largely unexplored.

Both target UV consistency of gravity from opposite ends: AS posits a UV fixed point within pure QFT, while the swampland claims pure-QFT gravity is in the swampland (must produce strings/towers). Possible tension or complementarity; almost no direct literature comparing WGC bounds with AS scaling predictions. Prime hunting zone.

LQG lacks a natural moduli landscape and string towers, so SDC/WGC are hard to state. Whether LQG/spin foams satisfy no-global-symmetries and completeness is essentially untouched. Speculative bridges: area-spectrum discreteness vs. charge-spectrum completeness; cobordism vs. spin-foam amplitudes.

Connes spectral action and spectrum finiteness could resonate with the finiteness/tameness conjecture and spectrum completeness, and o-minimal/tame structures might mirror spectral-triple constraints. Virtually no literature linking the two formalisms. Hunting zone.

CDT generates its own 'landscape' of phases (phase diagram with C, B, A, bifurcation phases); whether continuum limits respect swampland criteria (no global symmetries, WGC, finiteness) is unexplored. Possible analogy between CDT phase structure and landscape/swampland separation.

Causal sets predict a fluctuating small cosmological constant ~ +/- 1/sqrt(V) (Sorkin), intriguingly resonant with the swampland preference for dynamical rather than constant dark energy and with TCC. No direct comparison of the two dark-energy mechanisms exists.

GFT condensate cosmology produces effective cosmological dynamics and its own parameter space; whether its continuum EFTs satisfy swampland constraints (de Sitter, distance) is unexamined. Potential analogy between GFT phase landscape and the string landscape.

de Sitter conjecture and TCC reinterpret dark energy as evolving quintessence rather than a true cosmological constant, with explicit potentials (S-dual, hilltop) fitting DESI DR1/DR2 dynamical dark energy. Active observational interface 2024-2026.

Dark dimension scenario ties the active neutrino mass scale and a sterile-neutrino tower to the dark energy scale via m_nu ~ y^2 <H>^2 / M_hat and a ~micron extra dimension; gauged B-L extension predicts neutrino-mass / dark-energy coincidence. Testable but speculative.

Twistor and ambitwistor strings are chiral / infinite-tension string theories; KLT relations arise from closed strings as squares of open strings, and the double copy is the field-theory shadow of string factorization. N=4 SYM amplitudes and AdS/CFT are common ground. The conformal-supergravity non-decoupling in the twistor string is itself a string phenomenon.

Double copy and on-shell unitarity methods are the primary tools for computing supergravity UV divergences: N=8 supergravity is finite through four loops, with an expected partial(8)R^4 divergence at seven loops. The two pillars share a computational core.

Planar N=4 SYM (boundary of AdS5/CFT4) is the main laboratory of the amplitudes program (dual conformal symmetry, amplitude/Wilson-loop duality, integrability). Celestial holography attempts a distinct flat-space holography on the codim-2 celestial sphere; its relation to standard AdS/CFT via a flat-space limit is only partially understood.

Both hold that spacetime locality/causality is derived, not fundamental: the amplituhedron and surfaceology make locality and unitarity emerge from positive geometry / hidden zeros, paralleling thermodynamic/entropic emergence. Conceptual overlap is strong but the technical bridge is weak.

Two independent emergence stories: 'locality from positivity' (amplituhedron) vs 'spacetime from entanglement' (ER=EPR, tensor networks). A conjectural bridge links positive-geometry positivity to positivity of the modular Hamiltonian / entanglement entropy, but the two communities barely interact. A prime target for undiscovered connections.

Shared mathematics: 2-spinors, self-duality and Ashtekar variables (self-dual connection). Penrose's alpha-surfaces and the self-dual sector parallel the LQG self-dual formulation, and nonlinear gravitons have been derived from initial-value constraints in Ashtekar variables (arXiv:0706.2702). Linking twistor cohomology to spin networks / spin foams is almost unexplored.

Both concern the UV behavior of gravity but by opposite routes: asymptotic safety seeks an interacting UV fixed point in an off-shell Euclidean effective action, while amplitudes probe on-shell finiteness of specific theories. No systematic bridge; it is open whether the N=8 'enhanced cancellations' have a fixed-point interpretation.

Penrose's palatial twistor theory introduces a noncommutative quantized twistor (Heisenberg) algebra, and twistor space can be quantized by cocycle twist (arXiv:math/0701893). Shares the 'fuzzy spacetime' idea with noncommutative geometry, but Connes spectral triples and twistor deformations have not yet been matched.

Amplitudes and the classical double copy compute black-hole binary inspiral waveforms and Kerr solutions (Kerr = sqrt(Kerr)); celestial holography targets the flat-space S-matrix including black-hole scattering. Links to the information paradox and the Page curve remain indirect.

Self-dual/ASD curvature splitting and soft theorems have a semiclassical (gravitational memory) counterpart; Strominger's soft-theorem = memory = asymptotic-symmetry triangle is a bridge whose twistor side is newly being developed.

Positive geometry extends from the flat-space S-matrix to cosmological correlators (cosmological polytopes, kinematic flow, Bunch-Davies wavefunction), a new bridge to early-universe physics. Still at an early stage.

Positivity and locality of amplitudes (analyticity, hidden zeros) connect to swampland positivity bounds on EFT Wilson coefficients (constraints on consistent low-energy gravity). The precise link between amplituhedron positivity and swampland bounds is only partially developed.

The claim that spacetime, locality and unitarity are emergent rather than fundamental directly engages the conceptual foundations of quantum gravity (background independence, the problem of time, the ontology of spacetime).

Amplitude and double-copy techniques feed gravitational-wave waveform modeling (post-Minkowskian/post-Newtonian binary dynamics) for LIGO/Virgo/LISA, and underpin precision QCD predictions at colliders. A concrete, active application channel.

Modular theory is the mathematical backbone of entanglement-from-geometry: the modular Hamiltonian, JLMS relation, first law of entanglement and the crossed-product / type II_infinity area operator all live here. The 2022+ observer-algebra revolution made generalized entropy the von Neumann entropy of a type II algebra, sharpening Van Raamsdonk-style 'entanglement builds spacetime'. The densest and most active bridge.

Witten's crossed product turns the emergent type III_1 black-hole algebra into type II_infinity with a state-independent entropy; Kudler-Flam-Leutheusser-Satishchandran prove generalized black-hole entropy is von Neumann entropy on any Killing horizon. Algebraic ER=EPR recasts the Page-time information transition as the transfer of an emergent type III_1 subalgebra. Resolves firewall/interior puzzles via half-sided modular translations.

Leutheusser-Liu derive the emergent type III_1 algebra and infalling time of the eternal AdS black hole from boundary CFT modular data; Chandrasekaran-Penington-Witten obtain a type II_infinity large-N algebra whose entropy is the generalized entropy, a replica-free QES derivation. Subregion-subalgebra duality and JLMS make the von Neumann type the carrier of bulk geometric information. The fastest-growing crossroads.

The crossed-product / type II entropy is computed in the G->0 limit of Lorentzian effective field theory on a fixed semiclassical background; Bisognano-Wichmann modular flow reproduces the Unruh effect and the thermal time hypothesis recovers Hawking/Unruh temperatures from state-intrinsic modular flow. Modular theory thus organizes QFT-in-curved-spacetime entanglement and energy conditions.

Quantum reference frames are crossed products (De Vuyst-Eccles-Hoehn-Kirklin), so the observer/relational-observables and problem-of-time issues are the same algebraic structure that renders gravitational entropy finite and observer-dependent. The thermal time hypothesis gives a modular answer to the problem of time, and the type III_1 obstruction to factorization sharpens background-independence and the role of the observer.

Sorkin's spacetime entanglement entropy (SSEE), built from the Pauli-Jordan and Wightman functions of the covariant Sorkin-Johnston state, yields an area law only after a geometric truncation of near-zero modes -- structurally parallel to how the crossed product regulates the type III entropy of a region. A discrete causal-set route to the regulated, region-based (type II-like) entropy of modular constructions; almost unexplored as an explicit correspondence.

Type III_1 makes subregion entanglement entropy UV-divergent, demanding a physical cutoff; LQG's discrete area spectrum and nonzero area gap (Delta-A ~ l_Pl^2) is a candidate microscopic regulator that could play the role the crossed-product trace plays algebraically, fixing the additive constant in generalized entropy. The link between the area gap and the type II trace/area operator is suggestive but essentially unworked.

Connes' classification of type III factors, the modular spectrum, the Connes cocycle and the time-thermodynamics (thermal time) relation are foundational results of noncommutative geometry imported wholesale into quantum gravity. The same operator-algebra toolkit (modular automorphisms, crossed products, KMS) underlies both Connes' spectral geometry and the observer-algebra program. A deep, mostly latent shared-mathematics bridge.

The Chandrasekaran-Longo-Penington-Witten observer algebra for the de Sitter static patch (arXiv:2206.10780) is a type II_1 crossed product whose maximal-entropy state is empty de Sitter (cosmological-horizon Gibbons-Hawking entropy A/4G); a single static-patch observer is necessary even to DEFINE gravitational entropy in a closed/cosmological spacetime, making the modular-algebra picture directly a quantum-cosmology statement about horizon entropy and the wave function in a finite causal patch. This project's F-023 confirms by data that a discrete Sorkin-Johnston probe on a 2D de Sitter static patch SEES the bounded-patch finite-trace type II_1 signature (content saturation to a finite cap) versus the unbounded type II_infinity flat control -- a numerical bridge from CLPW de Sitter algebras to causal-set cosmology.

Chandrasekaran-Penington-Witten (arXiv:2209.10454) build the large-N single-trace algebra of a holographic CFT in the microcanonical ensemble as a type II_infinity crossed-product factor whose central operator is the renormalized area of the bifurcation surface and whose von Neumann entropy is the generalized entropy -- a Lorentzian, replica-free derivation of a special case of the quantum-extremal-surface prescription. The crossed product (adjoining the modular/ADM Hamiltonian to the emergent type III_1 boundary algebra) is the algebraic mechanism turning holographic entanglement into a finite, observer-relative entropy; subregion-subalgebra duality and JLMS make the von Neumann type the carrier of bulk geometric information.
